creator: dsh@vlink.ru
text:
Update to 0.48.3

How-To-Repeat: 
diff -Nru qico.orig/Makefile qico/Makefile

+++ qico/Makefile	Thu Nov 16 21:54:37 2000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	qico
-PORTVERSION=	0.48.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.48.3
 CATEGORIES=	comms
 MASTER_SITES=	http://lev.serebryakov.spb.ru/download/0.48/
 
diff -Nru qico.orig/distinfo qico/distinfo
--- qico.orig/distinfo	Sun Nov  5 02:14:34 2000
+++ qico/distinfo	Thu Nov 16 21:55:06 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (qico-0.48.2.tar.gz) = f1fdb98e94c055dced5005e149dbc889
+MD5 (qico-0.48.3.tar.gz) = 103dcbc0ce1ccf7e2b549680a7ff2287
